# Image Placeholders for Panther README

All images referenced in README.md are listed below with their expected filenames.
Replace each placeholder with the actual screenshot or graphic before publishing.

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `banner.png` | Project title banner (full-width, ideally 1280×320px) |
| `demo_chat.png` | Smartphone mockup — Telegram/Discord chat conversation with Panther |
| `demo_screenshot.png` | Smartphone mockup — Panther returning a screenshot it captured |
| `demo_webcam.png` | Smartphone mockup — Panther taking and sending a webcam photo |
| `demo_cron.png` | Smartphone mockup — Cron job creation confirmation message |
| `demo_webSearch.png` | Smartphone mockup — Web search result in chat |
| `demo_exec.png` | Smartphone mockup — Shell command execution output |
| `demo_subagent.png` | Smartphone mockup — Subagent spawning notification |
| `demo_multiChannel.png` | Smartphone mockup — Multi-channel interface overview |
| `demo_localMode.png` | Smartphone mockup — Ollama local inference in action |
| `architecture.png` | Architecture diagram showing crate relationships |

All mockup screenshots should use a clean smartphone frame (iOS or Android style).
Suggested tool: https://mockuphone.com or Figma device frames.
